title: Minecraft Classic
description: The original creative mode of Minecraft in your browser.

title: Slope
description: A fast-paced 3D running game where you navigate a ball through a neon-lit obstacle course.
Join the numbers and get to the 2048 tile!

title: Tetris
description: A clean, modern version of the classic block-stacking puzzle game.

title: Flappy Bird
description: Fly between the pipes without hitting them in this addictive classic.

title: Doodle Jump
description: Jump as high as you can in this vertical platformer.

title: Pac-Man
description: The classic arcade game. Eat all the dots and avoid the ghosts!

title: Cookie Clicker
description: The ultimate idle game about baking cookies.

title: Hextris
description: A fast-paced puzzle game inspired by Tetris but on a hexagon.
